semantic.role: Centralized configuration store for ArchSpine runtime settings, providing read/write access to persisted config data and LLM-specific configuration values, acting as a facade over lower-level infra modules.
responsibilities: Loads and validates configuration data from the filesystem via loadConfigData.
Resolves scan policies by delegating to core scan-policy resolver, storing them in the config data.
Manages LLM configuration values (set, clear, persist changes) using the supported-values delegation and filesystem save.
Handles artifact strategy and initialization state configuration sections.
Implements ConfigSupportedValueAccess interface to support get/set of supported config keys with delegation.
Saves configuration changes to disk, including post-save cleanup or synchronous write.
outOfScope: Runtime orchestration or service lifecycle management.
Network communication or HTTP endpoint handling.
User interface or CLI command parsing.
Core domain logic beyond configuration management.
Direct interaction with external LLM services or credential authentication.
invariants: Config must rely only on stable infra facades (loader, env, precommit, supported-values) and core utilities; it must not import from service or engine layers.
Config must delegate set/get of known configuration keys to supported-values module, not implement them directly.
Config must not expose internal file paths or raw SpineConfig structure outside the config layer.
All mutations to LLM configuration must persist via the save method to maintain consistency.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a stable, facade-based configuration store that enables runtime setting management and LLM configuration changes for ArchSpine's architectural governance features, aligning with the v1.0.0 semantic layer.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: ArchSpine v1.0.0 — Architectural Governance & Semantic Layer for the AI Era: This file integrates LLM config management and scan policy resolution into a unified store, supporting cross-cutting governance of prompt policies, model selection, and artifact strategies.

publicSurface: Config methods (inferred): load(), save(), getLLMValue(key), setLLMValue(key, value), clearLLMValue(key), getArtifactsConfig(), getInitStateConfig(), resolveScanPolicy(scanPolicy?)

English.role: Centralized configuration store for ArchSpine runtime settings, providing read/write access to persisted config data and LLM-specific configuration values, acting as a facade over lower-level infra modules.
responsibilities: Loads and validates configuration data from the filesystem via loadConfigData.
Resolves scan policies by delegating to core scan-policy resolver, storing them in the config data.
Manages LLM configuration values (set, clear, persist changes) using the supported-values delegation and filesystem save.
Handles artifact strategy and initialization state configuration sections.
Implements ConfigSupportedValueAccess interface to support get/set of supported config keys with delegation.
Saves configuration changes to disk, including post-save cleanup or synchronous write.
outOfScope: Runtime orchestration or service lifecycle management.
Network communication or HTTP endpoint handling.
User interface or CLI command parsing.
Core domain logic beyond configuration management.
Direct interaction with external LLM services or credential authentication.

Simplified Chinese.role: ArchSpine 运行时设置的集中配置存储，提供对持久化配置数据和 LLM 特定配置值的读写访问，作为底层基础设施模块的门面。
responsibilities: 通过 loadConfigData 从文件系统加载并验证配置数据。
通过委托给核心扫描策略解析器来解析扫描策略，并将其存储在配置数据中。
使用 supported-values 委托和文件系统保存来管理 LLM 配置值（设置、清除、持久化更改）。
处理工件策略和初始化状态配置部分。
实现 ConfigSupportedValueAccess 接口，通过委托支持对已知配置键的获取和设置。
将配置更改保存到磁盘，包括保存后清理或同步写入。
outOfScope: 运行时编排或服务生命周期管理。
网络通信或 HTTP 端点处理。
用户界面或 CLI 命令解析。
超出配置管理范围的核心领域逻辑。
直接与外部 LLM 服务或凭据认证交互。
